channels.messengerInstructions: To connect Messenger, go to your Facebook Page Settings > Messaging. You will need your Page ID and a Page Access Token generated from the Meta Developer Portal.
channels.instagramInstructions: To connect Instagram, you need an Instagram Business or Creator account connected to a Facebook Page. Get your Account ID and Access Token from the Meta Developer Portal.
channels.webchatInstructions: Web Chat requires no external credentials. Simply provide a name, and we will generate an embed code for your website.

docs.overviewText: The Mojeeb API allows you to programmatically manage agents, conversations, knowledge bases, and more. Use REST API calls with your API key for authentication.
docs.restApiDesc: Standard REST endpoints with JSON request/response format.
docs.secureDesc: All API calls are authenticated with Bearer tokens over HTTPS.
docs.easyIntegrationDesc: Simple curl commands or any HTTP client library.
docs.authText: All API requests require authentication using a Bearer token. Include your API key in the Authorization header of every request.
docs.keepSecure: Never expose your API key in client-side code. Always make API calls from your server.
docs.endpointsText: Below are the available API endpoints. All endpoints require authentication and are scoped to your organization.
docs.sendMessage: Send a message to a conversation

apiKeys.orgIdDescription: Use this ID in all API requests that require an organization context.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Mojeeb, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our AI-powered customer support platform.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
items: Conversation data processed through our platform

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our services
Process transactions and send related information
Send you technical notices and support messages
Train and improve our AI models (with your consent)

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

cookies.title: Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. We do not use third-party tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We may share your information with third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform, including cloud hosting providers, payment processors, and AI service providers. These providers are contractually obligated to protect your data.

userRights.title: Your Rights
items: Export your data in a portable format

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'last updated' date.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@mojeeb.app

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to Mojeeb. These Terms of Service govern your use of our AI-powered customer support platform. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account or using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy.

services.title: Our Services
services.content: Mojeeb provides an AI-powered customer support platform that includes:
items: AI chatbot agents for automated customer support
Multi-channel integration (WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Web Chat)

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for all activities that occur under your account.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree not to use our services to:
items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Impersonate others or provide false information
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
Use the platform for any illegal or harmful purposes

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, features, and functionality of our platform are owned by Mojeeb and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Your data remains your property.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your account at any time for violation of these terms. You may cancel your account at any time. Upon termination, your right to use the services will immediately cease.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Mojeeb shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes. Your continued use of the services after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@mojeeb.app

about.title: About Mojeeb
about.subtitle: We're building the future of AI-powered customer support for the Middle East and beyond.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower businesses with intelligent, multilingual customer support that works 24/7. We believe every customer deserves instant, accurate, and personalized responses — regardless of the time or language.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: A world where businesses of all sizes can provide world-class customer support through the power of artificial intelligence, making every customer interaction meaningful and efficient.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of AI technology to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your data is sacred. We build with privacy and security at the core.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: Powerful technology should be easy to use. We make complex AI accessible.

support.title: Customer Obsession
support.description: We eat our own cooking. Our support team uses Mojeeb to support you.

pricingPage.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingPage.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. Start free and upgrade as you grow.
pricingPage.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about our pricing

trial.a: Yes! Our Free plan lets you try Mojeeb with up to 100 messages per month, 1 AI agent, and 1 channel. No credit card required.

cancel.a: Absolutely. You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your plan will remain active until the end of the billing period.

upgrade.q: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
upgrade.a: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. When upgrading, the difference is prorated. When downgrading, the change takes effect at the next billing cycle.

payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
payment.a: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) and support payments through Stripe for secure processing.

enterprise.q: Do you offer custom enterprise plans?
enterprise.a: Yes! For larger organizations with specific needs, we offer custom plans with dedicated support, custom integrations, and volume pricing. Contact us for details.

pricingPage.ctaSubtitle: Join hundreds of businesses already using Mojeeb to transform their customer support.

featuresPage.title: Powerful Features for Modern Support
featuresPage.subtitle: Everything you need to deliver exceptional customer experiences across every channel.

multichannel.title: Multi-Channel Support
multichannel.description: Connect WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, and your website in one unified inbox. Manage all customer conversations from a single dashboard without switching between platforms.

emotion.title: Emotion Detection
emotion.description: Our AI automatically detects customer frustration, urgency, and sentiment in real-time. Escalate critical conversations to human agents before issues escalate.

routing.title: Smart Routing
routing.description: Intelligently route conversations based on context, urgency, and agent availability. Ensure every customer reaches the right person at the right time.

leads.title: Lead Extraction
leads.description: Automatically identify and capture potential customers from conversations. Extract contact details, interests, and buying signals to feed your sales pipeline.

analytics.title: Conversation Analytics
analytics.description: Deep insights into customer interactions, response times, resolution rates, and team performance. Make data-driven decisions to improve your support quality.

availability.title: 24/7 Availability
availability.description: Always-on AI support with near-zero response time. Your customers get instant answers any time of day, in any language, without waiting in queues.

aiAgents.title: Custom AI Agents
aiAgents.description: Create multiple AI agents with different personalities, knowledge bases, and specializations for different use cases.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Native Arabic and English support with automatic language detection. Your AI responds in your customer's preferred language.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Bank-grade encryption, SOC 2 compliance, and granular access controls to keep your customer data safe.

webhooks.title: Webhooks & API
webhooks.description: Connect Mojeeb to your existing tools with webhooks and a powerful REST API. Automate workflows and sync data seamlessly.

knowledgeBase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgeBase.description: Upload documents, FAQs, and guides. Your AI agent learns from your content and provides accurate, contextual answers.

featuresPage.ctaSubtitle: Start your free trial today and see the difference AI-powered support can make.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Help us shape the future of AI-powered customer support. We're looking for passionate people who want to make a difference.

remote.title: Remote First
remote.description: Work from anywhere in the world. We believe in flexibility and trust.

growth.title: Growth & Learning
growth.description: Continuous learning budget and mentorship from industry experts.

impact.title: Real Impact
impact.description: Your work directly impacts thousands of businesses and their customers.

culture.title: Great Culture
culture.description: Collaborative, inclusive, and fun. We celebrate diversity and creativity.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.empty: No open positions right now. But we're always looking for talented people!

footer.description: AI-powered customer support for the Middle East.
